tools.name: register_change
tools.description: Register an ICT change request with full DORA traceability.

tools.name: change_risk_assess
tools.description: Automated risk assessment based on type, scope, and controls.

tools.name: approval_check
tools.description: Verify approval chain, SoD compliance, and prerequisites.

tools.name: test_evidence
tools.description: Record or view test execution evidence for a change.

tools.name: rollback_plan
tools.description: Validate rollback plan readiness for a change.

tools.name: patch_compliance
tools.description: Patch lag analysis — overdue patches against scheduled deadlines.

tools.name: sod_check
tools.description: Detect Segregation of Duties violations across all changes.

tools.name: change_stats
tools.description: Dashboard: volume, risk distribution, test/rollback coverage, emergency ratio.
